---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "from_seurat_to_h5mu"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Converts a Seurat file into an H5MU file"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_seurat_to_h5mu`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/convert/from_seurat_to_h5mu)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_seurat_to_h5mu)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_seurat_to_h5mu/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_seurat_to_h5mu).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_seurat_to_h5mu/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument groups

### Inputs

|Name      |Description                     |Attributes                               |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input` |Input Seurat file               |`file`, required, example: `"input.rds"` |
|`--assay` |Name of the assay to be mapped. |`string`, default: `"RNA"`               |


### Conversion parameters

|Name               |Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |Attributes                                                                    |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--layers_mapping` |Mapping of Seurat's Layers to AnnData layers.  If True, all layers will be mapped by name.  If False, no layers will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                                |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"layer": "seurat_layer"}"`           |
|`--obs_mapping`    |Mapping of Seurat's observation columns to AnnData obs columns.  If True, all observation columns will be mapped by name. If False, no columns will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys. |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"obs_field": "seurat_observation"}"` |
|`--var_mapping`    |Mapping of Seurat's feature rows to AnnData var columns. If True, all features will be mapped by name. If False, no features will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                   |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"var_field": "seurat_feature"}"`     |
|`--uns_mapping`    |Mapping of Seurat's Misc to AnnData uns.  If True, all fields will be mapped by name. If False, no fields will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                                      |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"uns_field": "seurat_Misc"}"`        |
|`--obsm_mapping`   |Mapping of Seurat's Embeddings to AnnData obsm fields.  If True, all fields will be mapped by name. If False, no fields will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                        |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"obsm_field": "seurat_Embedding"}"`  |
|`--varm_mapping`   |Mapping of Seurat's Loadings to AnnData varm fields.  If True, all fields will be mapped by name. If False, no fields will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                          |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"varm_field": "seurat_Loadings"}"`   |
|`--obsp_mapping`   |Mapping of Seurat's Graphs to AnnData obsp fields. If True, all fields will be mapped by name. If False, no fields will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                             |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"obsp_field": "seurat_Graph"}"`      |
|`--varp_mapping`   |Mapping of Seurat's Misc to AnnData varp fields.  If True, all fields will be mapped by name. If False, no fields will be mapped. For custom mapping, provide a json key/value array with Seurat fields as values and AnnData fields as keys.                              |`string`, default: `"True"`, example: `"{"varp_field": "seurat_Misc"}"`       |
|`--x_mapping`      |A string specifying Seurat's Layer to mapped to the .X slot, If not provided, no data will be copied to the .X slot.                                                                                                                                                       |`string`                                                                      |


### Outputs

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                    |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--modality`           |Name of the modality to be created.                                                                            |`string`, default: `"rna"`                 |
|`--output`             |Output H5MU file                                                                                               |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |
|`--output_compression` |Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files. By default no compression is applied. |`string`, example: `"gzip"`                |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author, maintainer)
